creator: pfgshield-freebsd@yahoo.com
text:
- Add experimental option for Chaco.
- Remove BROKEN for Metis option: it builds fine here.
- Remove BROKENness for 4.x, we don't check that anymore.
- No functional change: both Metis and Chaco are off by default.

Note: when math/chaco was ported I was careful to include the required patches for mbdyn.
